description_long: This object is a standard traffic cone with a distinctive orange color and two wide, horizontal reflective white stripes encircling its upper section. The cone is topped with a small, rounded orange tip and features a broad, square base for stability. A black and yellow striped plastic barrier pole is attached to the top of the cone, extending horizontally to connect with another identical cone, forming a visual and physical barrier. The base appears thick and sturdy, likely weighted to prevent tipping, and the cone's surface is slightly matte with a semi-soft texture typical of flexible plastic or rubber. No logos or markings are visible, and the object appears to be in lightly used but clean condition, with no significant wear or damage.
description: An orange traffic cone with two white reflective stripes and a black-yellow barrier pole attached, featuring a broad square base and a rounded tip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange cone with two white stripes and the square base, with the barrier pole extending away from the viewer.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the black and yellow barrier pole attached to the cone, with the cone's profile and base visible.
description_view_2: Rear view of the cone, showing the two white stripes and the attachment point of the barrier pole at the tip.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the barrier pole extending to the left, with the cone's profile and base visible.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal reflective white stripes encircle the upper section of the cone, evenly spaced and highly visible.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is small, rounded, and solid orange, with a black and yellow barrier pole attached at the very top.
attribute_base_design: The base is broad, square, and thick, made of sturdy material for stability, with a slightly textured surface for grip.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the cone or barrier.
attribute_condition: The object appears lightly used and clean, with no visible damage, cracks, or significant wear.
